macro_events.event_summary: US government reportedly planning a $2B award program for quantum computing companies, including taking equity stakes in recipients.
primary_drivers: Direct government capital injection into pure-play quantum names
Validation/de-risking of commercialization timeline for quantum tech
Sector rotation/short squeeze on small-cap quantum basket

beneficiaries.rationale: Largest pure-play public quantum computing company by market cap; trapped-ion leader and most likely recipient of any federal award given existing DoD/Air Force Research Lab contracts. Direct cash + equity validation.
Pure-play superconducting quantum (Rigetti); already has DARPA/AFRL contracts and on-shore fab in Fremont — fits 'domestic quantum manufacturing' criteria for federal equity stake.
D-Wave — pure-play quantum annealing/gate-model; small float means even modest award size moves shares materially. Peer-correlation flow trade.
Quantum Computing Inc. — photonic quantum; smallest float in the basket, will move violently on any sector flow regardless of whether they're a direct recipient.
Arqit Quantum — quantum encryption; rides the basket even though it's adjacent (QKD/security) rather than compute. Peer rotation beneficiary.

Operates largest quantum hardware fleet (Condor/Heron processors) and has historical federal/national lab partnerships; would be a likely award recipient on the incumbent side, though impact diluted by $200B+ market cap.
Majority owner of Quantinuum (trapped-ion peer to IONQ) which has been pursuing IPO; federal program raises Quantinuum's implied valuation and de-risks Honeywell's stake mark-up.

losers.rationale: Alphabet's Google Quantum AI is a leading effort but unlikely to receive federal equity stakes (too big, foreign cloud exposure); a $2B program tilted toward US pure-plays slightly disadvantages the hyperscaler-internal quantum efforts in talent/narrative terms. Low-confidence, marginal effect.

headlines: Quantum stocks soar as U.S. reportedly plans $2 billion ‘award’ and taking equity stakes
